In Paris, he meets up with a friend who explains the finer points of French social etiquette, while in Germany, Tony compares a gentle spin in a replica of the first automobile with an exhilarating blast in the latest Formula 1 car. He then travels across India and Burma, beginning in Delhi, where he visits one of the city's oldest markets, before taking a ride on the Himalayan Mountain Railway

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The De Ropers' hopes of a peaceful life in Yeovil, Somerset, were rudely shattered by their neighbour Peter Stoodley's 120 noisy chickens, and they spent their first two years in their new home battling to persuade the authorities to ban him from keeping animals. In a quiet Anglesey village, 67-year-old Pamela Booth's discovered that her neighbour had been fraudulently using her bank card to steal more than £1,000 over 10 months, while a 24-year-old wannabe rapper in Dagenham, east London, generated more than 80 complaints after repeatedly keeping residents awake by playing loud music into the early hours in his flat

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Two ministers in Liverpool take over an old church with a plan to turn it into a community centre, only to be obstructed by a group of squatters who refuse to leave. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The documentary about landlord and tenancy issues catches up on some of the stories featured so far. Andy made a mistake when he rented out his north London home to someone he knew, only for his so-called friend to sublet the property, pocket the profits and pay Andy nothing. Claire and her five children will see their weekly budget increase from £171 to a massive £3,000, while Rana is hoping the swap will give her children a taste of her own upbringing in Syria

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: West Midlander Vince rushes to get his new bar ready, having mistakenly thought he was paying for a working bar when it turns out he had actually just bought the lease on the building - leaving him to do the rest himself. Meanwhile, former dancer Bambi plans a racy show to raise cash for a local dog rescue shelter, and Andy tours the coast buying and selling old furniture

programme.title: ...And Proud
programme.desc: Comedian Sue Perkins narrates a light-hearted look at people who have learned to exploit their beauty and charm for material gain

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: People getting by on benefits in the Midlands. Thirty-year-old Derby man James believes his bipolar disorder prevents him having a regular job His dream is to be a full-time entertainer - will his alter ego Mrs Plonker help him into spotlight? Plus, a part-time cleaner who wants to become a model and a former publican whose type 2 diabetes is hindering her search for work

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: The Secret World of Your Rubbish
programme.desc: The documentary visits a waste facility in Nottingham which offers an alternative to landfill, burning rubbish to create energy for surrounding homes. It also follows the work of a Glasgow father and son who recycle some of the hundreds of thousands of tons of clothing thrown out every year and the team at Motorpoint Arena in Nottingham, cleaning up after a heavy metal gig

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Until it closed in 1966 the Deeside Railway followed the River Dee upstream from Aberdeen into what is now the Cairngorms National Park. As luck would have it, Queen Victoria purchased Balmora just as the line was set to open, giving the route prestige. Rob Bell retraces the route, visiting a shooting estate, tossing a caber and finding an unmistakable Highland 'brand' that all owe their existence to this royal railway age. He also explores a quiet valley of cattle farming and timber sawmills, and, in truth, a simple railway that struggled for decades to justify its own existence, despite its royal veneer

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to a divorcing couple trying to sell their three-bedroom Victorian semi in Camberley, Surrey. The main problems are smelly furniture, unfinished DIY jobs and a caravan blocking the driveway, so the team gives the place a lick of paint and a clean

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: Cocoon (1985)
programme.desc: The elderly residents of a retirement home treat themselves to an occasional dip in the pool at an abandoned house. It turns out that friendly aliens in human form are using the place to restore dormant members of their species - and energy from their cocoons is giving the old-timers a new lease of life. Ron Howard's sci-fi drama, with Wilford Brimley, Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Don Ameche and Steve Guttenberg

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994)
programme.desc: A London man's misfortunes in love look set to change when he meets an American beauty. However, the prospect of a transatlantic relationship succeeding seems slim, so the pair go their separate ways - only for him to realise he is unable to get her out of his mind. Richard Curtis's comedy, with Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, John Hannah, Charlotte Coleman, Kristin Scott Thomas, Simon Callow and James Fleet

programme.title: Professor Marston and the Wonder Women (2017)
programme.desc: The story of psychologist William Moulton Marston, and his relationship with his wife and their mistress who would inspire the creation of Wonder Woman. Biopic, starring Luke Evans, Rebecca Hall and Bella Heathcote

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice and Zombies (2016)
programme.desc: Regency England is overrun by hordes of zombies following an outbreak of the Black Death. Five sisters put their talent for martial arts to good use fighting the ravenous hordes of the walking dead, while also contending with the equally daunting challenge of finding suitable husbands. Comedy adventure based on Seth Grahame-Smith's novel, starring Lily James, Sam Riley, Matt Smith and Charles Dance

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: The teenage detective and his future sidekick Watson meet for the first time at boarding school. The death of Holmes's mentor sets the youngsters on their first case, and they discover that former members of an archaeological survey team have died under suspicious circumstances - pointing to a sinister Egyptian cult using hallucinogenic poisons to kill its victims. Adventure, starring Nicholas Rowe, Alan Cox and Sophie Ward

programme.title: Zoo (2017)
programme.desc: During the 1941 German air raids on Belfast, a young lad inadvertently becomes the protector of a baby elephant after his zoo-owning father is sent to fight. Can he and his friends save Buster from being put down? Family drama, starring Toby Jones, Penelope Wilton and Art Parkinson

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: Wind River (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran hunter helps an FBI agent investigate the murder of a young woman on a Wyoming Native American reservation. Taylor Sheridan's crime drama, starring Jeremy Renner and Elizabeth Olsen

programme.title: Drag Me to Hell (2009)
programme.desc: A bank employee refuses a mortgage extension to an elderly woman, who responds by placing her under a curse. As she endures a series of unexplained misfortunes, she discovers a demon has been sent after her, and if she cannot break the spell in three days, it will take her to Hell. Sam Raimi's horror, starring Alison Lohman, Justin Long and Lorna Raver

programme.title: Berlin Syndrome (2017)
programme.desc: After a one-night stand with a man in Berlin, an Australian photographer wakes up to discover that he has imprisoned her in his flat. Horror, starring Teresa Palmer

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
programme.desc: When a cosmic blunder leaves Earth in the path of an asteroid, it's up to Sid the sloth and pals Manny and Diego to save the day. Animated sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Edward Scissorhands (1990)
programme.desc: A reclusive genius creates a boy but dies before completing him, leaving his brainchild with scissor-like blades in place of hands. A kindly woman from a nearby suburb takes pity on the lonely figure and welcomes him into her home. He quickly becomes a hit in the neighbourhood - but then his new friends start to turn against him. Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Jason Bourne (2016)
programme.desc: Former government operative Jason Bourne has been in hiding for 12 years after exposing a sinister CIA operation. However, he once again finds himself being hunted down when a former CIA operative gone rogue acquires top secret information - including details of Bourne's own father's involvement in a clandestine scheme. Action thriller, starring Matt Damon, Tommy Lee Jones, Alicia Vikander and Julia Stiles

programme.title: A Most Wanted Man (2014)
programme.desc: An immigrant to Hamburg who has previously suffered torture tries to lay a claim to an inheritance from his father. His story attracts the attention of American and German intelligence agencies, who try to determine his identity as suspicions grow that he is a dangerous extremist. Thriller based on John le Carre's novel, starring Philip Seymour Hoffman, Rachel McAdams and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother (2011)
programme.desc: A naive marijuana grower is released from prison to find his girlfriend has thrown him out of their farm. He turns to his three sisters for help, and as each takes a turn at giving him a place to stay, she finds her stable life thrown into chaos. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Elizabeth Banks, Zooey Deschanel and Emily Mortimer

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jim and Justine kick off the competition in Portsmouth, before Leanne and Gary and Stewart and Lynn take their turns as they try to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee is tasked with planning a surprise wedding for bride-to-be Rebecca, but instead, goes on a week-long trip around Europe with his brother Lee and his friends

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The first six couples head off on their honeymoons. From Cairns to the Cook Islands, it's smooth sailing for some, but for others it's a bumpy road

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The family gathers around the laptop to video chat with Ryder in New Orleans on his 18th birthday, but the computer crashes before they get the chance to talk. Joe insists that he can fix it, but Mel is convinced they need to employ an expert to repair it. Dani asks Lennox for advice on matters of the heart but doesn't follow her words of wisdom. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jeffords becomes anxious about his upcoming lieutenant's exam, Peralta, Captain Holt and the squad decide to distract him from the stress by holding the precinct's annual Halloween Heist on a new date, Cinco de Mayo

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster becomes inspired by his hero Albert Einstein and tries to play the violin. Mary thinks that she may be pregnant and goes to buy a pregnancy test with Meemaw

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius moves in with Dr Sturgis for a night to see what it would be like to leave home and go to college. During his absence, a lonely Mary tries to bond with other members of the family

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isn't long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel persuades her father Russell to give Joe's mother Gloria advice about drawing up a will, but is alarmed when the pair start to get along a little too well. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander try to work out whether they should be 'friends with benefits'. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe are given a taste of the future when they are frozen during a freak avalanche, and thawed out 100 years later, only to discover the world has changed dramatically during the course of the last century. Comedy, directed by and starring Joey Lawrence, with Melissa Joan Hart

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the school dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey, but Beverly comes up with a candidate who surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops get into a huge argument. Allie Grant (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly has difficulty accepting her son has such deep emotions at his tender age. Problems ensue when Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch American football with Lainey's father. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy is back - and this time things between him and Jake are personal. Amy and Charles try to find the perfect new vending machine for the Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A prank goes disastrously wrong, destroying a crucial piece of evidence, leaving the officers trying to solve the mystery - with the help of visiting Detective Dillman (JK Simmons)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: After being released from the mental hospital, Dr Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Wallace Shawn and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meemaw struggles after her break-up with Dr Sturgis. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage, Raegan Revord and Annie Potts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friend's secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howard's suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Amy Conachan and Jessica Fox look back at an episode from 2006. Becca and Justin's affair is exposed and the police arrive to make an arrest

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: It's time for the return of loveable 54-year-old John. A year on and with added pressure to get things right, the experts must find him the perfect match second time around

His naive wife is unaware of his dual employment, and goes in search of adventure - only to end up in the clutches of terrorists who have stolen a nuclear weapon. James Cameron's action comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jamie Lee Curtis and Tom Arnold

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy and Riley's passionate sex life stirs up tortured spirits haunting his fraternity house. Soon a party is disrupted by an outbreak of disturbing poltergeist activity. While everyone else flees the building, a blissfully unaware Buffy and Riley remain trapped inside as the spirits drain the life energy from them. Supernatural adventures, with Sarah Michelle Gellar

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining-room table causes Sheldon to re-evaluate his life. Meanwhile, Howard is offered the chance to go back to the International Space Station, and Bernadette struggles to decide whether to encourage him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After arguing with Sheldon, Howard tries to make amends by taking him to Nasa's headquarters in Houston. Elsewhere, Penny has second thoughts about quitting her job as a waitress when her car dies, while Amy tries to find Raj a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Politics Live, After Life, Dancing on Ice: The Final, Only Connect, Cheat, and Baewatch: Parental Guidance. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively discussions from the comfort of their own homes. Narrated by Craig Cash. From March 2019

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Mother's boy Tiago plans to put his self-conscious bride Karlette on the big screen at his 1950s drive-in wedding. However, his attention-shunning fiancee wants her wedding day to be something intimate and contemporary

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Competitive adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high on his big day and has an adventurous plan to take his wedding to the sky. However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost gives advice to the Dane and Nicole Ostler, who are struggling to control their two rambunctious boys while also still grieving the loss of their first child

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Meld and Joe write thank you cards to everyone who sent them wedding gifts, and pretend to be delighted with a huge, ugly coffee maker given to them by Aunt Bunny and Uncle Bert. Meld makes Joe return the machine to the shop, but then Bunny and Bert pay an unexpected visit to the newlyweds. Lennox is upset when Marco gets an offer he cannot refuse. Valerie Harper (Rhoda) guest stars

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel discovers that Joe used to be a member of a boy band in his youth, but when she buys Dani a piano to foster her dreams of a musical career, she is surprised to find that Joe is completely opposed to the idea of his daughter attempting to become a musician. Zander tries to keep it a secret from his girlfriend Lilah that he and Lennox are working together

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe puts a ban on the use of all mobiles and computers over the weekend in the hope of improving communication within the family. However, he soon comes to regret his decision when he is offered a new job and needs to get back to his prospective employer in time to accept the post

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe is furious when he finds out that Dani had some older friends over to the house who drank his expensive bottle of wine, but wonders whether she is being totally honest with him about the event. When Lennox expresses admiration for her college professor Evita, Mel grows jealous of their relationship, until Evita asks to interview Mel for her latest research project. Shalita Grant guest stars alongside Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel does her best to talk Lennox out of going to Colombia on a research expedition with her college professor, while Joe makes Dani call her mother to confess about her recent wine-drinking escapades. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly intervenes when she finds out that Coach Mellor has a strained relationship with his brother, Coach Nick, but when the two men face off in the gym, Adam and Barry join in. Meanwhile, Geoff and Erica struggle with their long-distance relationship

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides to reinvent herself by going to night school so that she can quit her substitute teacher role and own her own business, but Murray dislikes change and tries to convince her to take a different path. Meanwhile, Barry embarks on a makeover of his own, and Erica struggles to balance her academic studies with her social life in college and calls on Adam for assistance

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Jackie fall out over which Halloween costumes to wear, so Murray teaches Adam to agree mindlessly with everything his girlfriend says just to keep her happy. However, Murray's strategy soon backfires, causing issues in his relationship with Beverly. Meanwhile, as Lainey visits Erica at college, Barry aims to get back together with her

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray's furniture shop faces competition from a rival with an attention-grabbing advertising campaign, so Adam offers to make his father a television commercial starring Marvin. When Barry's attempts to court a girl at school end in failure, Beverly steps in with some advice that works a little too well

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is hurt when Professor Proton (Bob Newark) contacts Leonard for help, so he befriends TV scientist Bill Nye, and Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls' night in making home-made jewellery. Starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki, and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Raj's old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes an important decision after Leonard tries to help her in the aftermath of a failed role on a TV show. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart practise talking to strangers at a shopping centre, and Sheldon studies to become a comic genius. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Shrek Forever After (2010)

Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz

Action comedy based on the TV series, starring Dwayne Johnson, Zac Efron, Alexandra Daddario and Priyanka Chopra

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: IT worker Rodney is 45 but has never had a relationship and is looking for an English rose who can change his romantic fortunes. Will executive assistant Mandy be that woman? Football coach Julian, 29, struggles to approach girls and usually asks his friends to do it for him, while his date Becca, 26, is looking for someone who is part bad boy to join her on the party scene

With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost gives advice to the Dane and Nicole Ostler, who are struggling to control their two rambunctious boys while also still grieving the loss of their first child

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Uncle Marvin reveals he has become a stockbroker and convinces Barry and his friends to invest their money with him. Beverly invites 50 people over for a Thanksgiving 'potluck' dinner instead of cooking for the family

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray insists that a reluctant Adam must have driving lessons, the family learns something new about Pops in the process. Erica's grumpy nature means she has a hard time making friends at college and she turns down an invitation to a toga party, but when Barry visits her for the weekend, he quickly thrives on the college social scene

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Barry decide to write a song like the iconic Parents Just Don't Understand. But when they don't get the reaction they expected from Murray, the boys take steps to make amends. Beverly keeps calling Erica at college, but Erica wants some space from her mother and screens her phone calls, forcing Beverly to adopt drastic measure

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Erica tells Beverly she is going to spend the first night of Hanukkah with Geoff and his family, Beverly starts a competition over who hosts the best Hanukkah party. Meanwhile, Barry seeks advice from his grandfather about how to be cool and Pops suggests that he should enter the school's holiday talent show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to relax after he is forced to take a holiday, and when Penny quits her job the duo end up spending time together. Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Sheldon decides to hold his own comic-book convention and searches for a suitable star guest for the event. Meanwhile, the girls take tea at a hotel but discover that maturity is over-rated. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy take a train ride to the Napa Valley with Howard and Bernadette on Valentine's Day, while Leonard and Penny head to the vets when they volunteer to look after Raj's dog. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining-room table causes Sheldon to re-evaluate his life. Meanwhile, Howard is offered the chance to go back to the International Space Station, and Bernadette struggles to decide whether to encourage him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After arguing with Sheldon, Howard tries to make amends by taking him to Nasa's headquarters in Houston. Elsewhere, Penny has second thoughts about quitting her job as a waitress when her car dies, while Amy tries to find Raj a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette download a dating app onto Amy's phone in order to find her a new boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Australia: Earth's Magical Kingdom, The Chase, Line of Duty, The Brexit Storm: Laura Kuenssberg's Inside Story, Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol, and Celebrity Painting Challenge. Narrated by Craig Cash

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. The shows under their scrutiny include Our Planet, This Morning, Britain's Got Talent, Line of Duty, Blind Date and 24 Hours in Police Custody. Narrated by Craig Cash

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon receives a nasty surprise when he visits his mother in Houston, while Raj's murder mystery party causes conflict for the rest of the gang members. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is racked with guilt when he tries to date Lucy and Emily at the same time, Penny has trouble deciding whether to take a role in a film, and Sheldon struggles to choose between two gaming systems. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp joins jewellery-maker Rachel Jeffrey to help a soon-to-be-married couple create their own wedding rings, and learns how gold can revive an old picture frame at little cost

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Nicki Pritchard and Nigel Cooper are unsure whether to purchase a second home on Britain's south coast in Brighton or in the Costa del Sol, Spain. Property experts Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton show them properties in both locations to try to help them decide

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Redditch where Henry restores a 1970s Kawasaki motorbike, while Simon takes a pair of rusty cinema seat supports and creates a desirable garden bench

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Wales, where Henry restores a Royal Enfield motorbike, converting it into a classic cafe racer. Simon's choice of an old school house radiator springs a leak, but he gets an 1980s pinball machine back to its best

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca receive a booking and prepare for the imminent arrival of their first paying guests. Martin and Kim take their chateau search up a gear and view the last property on their list. Paul and Karen embark on creating a cinema room in their barn, but the building looks set to collapse and their hopes of breaking even start to crumble. Angel helps to cushion the blow by upholstering a family heirloom

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: In Cornwall, Charlie Luxton helps Peter and Mollie Goodman build a continental kit home with coastal views, but his suggestions are met with scepticism

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon White and Shirley Boyle, owners of the Old Hall Country House in Madeley, Cheshire, host the week's first round of the B&B competition. The guests are impressed by the 16th-century building, and are taken tap-dancing and to a private fine-dining restaurant, but one of them is dissatisfied with her bedroom's layout and the garnish on her eggs at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eileen Finn invites her fellow contestants to the four-star Thornley House in Allendale, Northumberland, for the second round of the contest, but struggles to follow the impressive first event. The hostess's pet cats are not to all of her guests' liking, and with activities including a tour of a feline cemetery, the theme for the stay is made abundantly clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jessica and Adrian Rashleigh are the third hosts, at their three-bedroom establishment Chy Conyn in St Ives, Cornwall. For the activity they arrange a magical mystery camper van tour of the local sights. Some of the guests struggle with the small breakfast room but the food is a success, and Eileen Finn demonstrates her karate skills on the men

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the Cavendish in Bournemouth, run by Tim and Karen Sturgess. On arrival, the competitors are impressed by the 'pink palace', but things go downhill when a bed is broken and one couple are allocated a room next to the front door. However, Eileen is delighted by the feline memorabilia in her room and the group enjoys a spot of indoor paint-balling and an open-top bus tour of the resort

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Simon White of Old Hall Country House is surprised by an overpayment and Eileen Finn from the four-star Thornley receives tough criticism, before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The keepers try to work out why male red panda Jung is losing weight, with a full medical examination scheduled after a special diet fails to solve the problem. West African mandrill JC is being challenged for his dominant position by his sons Ludo and Jareth and, while JC is taken for some health checks, Ludo gets 'over-friendly' with his dad's girlfriend. Tempers start to fray among Chester Zoo's Humboldt penguin colony during the annual moult - can youngsters Frazzle and Munch avoid being picked on by the grown-ups?

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick faces a new challenge when he is called upon to save the life of a buzzard with a broken wing. A couple's beloved labrador turns up at the clinic with badly damaged elbow joints, and a pampered cat that is used to living the good life faces surgery to repair slipping knee-caps

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Anna and Edward host another big wedding, but Edward is put out of action and with the food delayed and the weather threatening to take a turn for the worse, Anna has to work hard to pull it off without a hitch. Dick visits Tim and Rebecca as they run into structural problems on their second B&B guest suite. With only one guest room up and running, they're in a race against time to double their income by the end of the summer season. Paul tackles a leaking outbuilding to finish the cinema room, while Karen does all she can to bag their first wedding booking

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of 37-year-old Angelo Mastropietro, as he transforms a damp, dark and abandoned cave in Worcestershire. Having recently been diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, Angelo wants to create a retreat to help him cope with the news and become a 21st-century caveman. He has a budget of £100,000 and plans to almost single-handedly carve, cut and drill into the hillside to make the cave comfortable for contemporary living. However, there is no manual for a project of this kind, and the unique challenge soon becomes an obsession

programme.title: Code 37: Sex Crimes
programme.desc: DJ Isis, a rising star of the nightclub circuit, is raped in her dressing room after a gig and has no idea who attacked her. Hannah quickly discovers the victim has given up just about everything, including herself, to get to the top. Belgian crime thriller, starring Veerle Baetens and Charlotte Vandermeersch. In Flemish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff at King's College Hospital treat patients on Valentine's Day, including a 53-year-old psychologist who has injured his shoulder in a motorcycle accident. His partner is abroad and he doesn't want to worry her, so he decides to keep the incident a secret. Also in the A&E department are a man with a bleed on the brain and an elderly widower who has been bitten by his dog

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Abby has had an accident at a diving pool and needs to have her head and neck scanned for serious injuries. Worried mum Nikki puts on a brave face while doctors perform tests, but dad Scott is stuck hundreds of miles away in Scotland. Meanwhile, Anne and Holton - part of a security team dealing with more than 50 incidents a month - encounter a variety of challenging patients on the night shift at King's College Hospital in London

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: In Cornwall, Charlie Luxton helps Peter and Mollie Goodman build a continental kit home with coastal views, but his suggestions are met with scepticism

His partner is abroad and he doesn't want to worry her, so he decides to keep the incident a secret. Also in the A&E department are a man with a bleed on the brain and an elderly widower who has been bitten by his dog

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp learns how to create a flower arrangement for the petite category at the Royal Cornwall Show, under the instruction of master florist Sioned Rowlands

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: A man who works abroad for a lot of the year and his partner want to live in the best possible environment to raise their two-year-old son. However, they cannot decide whether this is in Somerset or near Valencia in Spain. Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton step in with some expert advice

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Richard Fall and Laura Howes are thinking of settling down to start a family, but are torn between buying a large home in Wakefield, West Yorkshire, near where they live, or purchasing an apartment in Valencia on Spain's eastern coast

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Andy and Gaynor Jones have inherited enough money to buy a holiday home for their family, but are torn between St Ives in Cornwall and Costa del Azahar in Spain

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps ballet dancer Nicol and his brother Harry get on the property ladder, exploring potential new homes in north-east London. Phil Spencer helps Tinder success story Hiren and Priyanka, who have been searching for a home for a year following a whirlwind romance

programme.title: Grand Designs: Living in
programme.desc: In the third of four special programmes, Kevin McCloud reveals how self-builders in the suburbs are transforming this most maligned of residential environments. He draws on some of the best examples from the 15-year history of Grand Designs, talks to experts in the latest architectural thinking and reveals the designs that have reinvented the suburbs as a place where home-owners really can have it all

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Banker Mandeep Rajput is keen to impress as he hosts the first dinner party in Dudley, West Midlands, joined by musical pensioner Di Dawson, quiz master Adam Reece, dog groomer Vicky Pell and businesswoman Sarah Freeman

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub quiz host Adam Reece takes charge of the second dinner party in Dudley, West Midlands, hoping his 'mixed up' theme, Italian menu and game show-style entertainment will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pensioner Di Dawson hosts the third dinner party from Dudley, West Midlands, and hopes some good honest home cooking will impress the guests. However, the evening is overshadowed by Adam Reece's offensive humour and his flirtatious behaviour with dog groomer Vicky Pell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog groomer Vicky Pell hosts a cruise ship-themed party for her guests in Dudley in the West Midlands, but Adam, whose smutty sense of humour has caused outrage all week, continues to behave badly. His actions eventually create a rift with Di, threatening to turn the evening sour

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businesswoman Sarah Freeman hosts the final dinner party from Dudley, West Midlands, and hopes to impress her guests with a Moroccan menu, but the simmering tension between rivals Adam Reece and Di Dawson threatens to jeopardise her chances of winning the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Langsmeade House in Thame, Oxfordshire, where Dutch-born owner Marianne Abben and her housekeeper Fran Birch hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The quirky pair's hosting style proves a hit with some of their guests, before others reveal their competitive side during a Charleston dance lesson

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Stratford House Guesthouse in Stratford-upon-Avon on their second outing, where couple Natasha and Dai Pollock hope to impress their peers. But things do not run smoothly, as the guests are left unimpressed with the decor and discover nasty surprises in some of the drawers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is pet-friendly Edmund House in Deal, Kent, where owner Michael Prime is joined by his mum Lorna. On arrival, Marianne Abben and Fran Birch love the seaside-inspired room, but entrepreneur Mark Genders is far from thrilled by the 'no frills' experience. Over dinner, tensions run high after self-confessed trouble-maker Marianne asks Mark to reveal which of the group he would and would not employ, and Lorna gets short shrift when she puts forward her application

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Genders welcomes the contestants to the Five Bells Pub in Berkshire and hopes they will approve of his small but perfectly formed rooms. He organises an ale-tasting activity, although it fails to please all of his guests. Michael and Lorna admit they have seen a new side of Mark - however, will it affect their feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners settle some scores and discover how much they have been paid, before the winner is revealed. Marianne and Fran from Langsmeade House begin by explaining that their worn rug is in fact a 200-year-old antique, Natasha and Dal from Stratford House confront Michael and Lorna about their strong language and cleaning techniques, while Mark Genders compares his experience at Edmund House to flying with a low budget airline

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of teacher Michele Long and architect Michael Howe, who want to restore and transform a 100-year-old blacksmiths in Co Antrim. With virtually no practical experience, Michael wants to do as much of the project as possible by himself. However, the weather on the coastline is fierce, and the freezing weather coupled with a tight budget of 150k means the build is stretched from one to three years

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients arriving at King's College Hospital in London include 26-year-old Nicholas, whose jaw has been fractured and dislocated in an unprovoked attack, and Tyrell, 17, who needs to have a blackened toenail removed following a football injury. Meanwhile, Ho has brought his grandmother Amoui to the ward after finding her collapsed in her flat

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Single father Gary, 47, is put in a medically induced coma at King's College Hospital to reduce the risk of brain damage following a serious motorcycle accident, and 69-year-old Steve confronts his fear of needles when a nurse has to remove a fishbone stuck in his finger. Meanwhile, 58-year-old lung cancer patient Terry is in A&E with his carer Sandy, a year after being given two weeks to live

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest makes a valiant effort to give up cigarettes for Lent, inspired by a challenge from Dick Byrne, his opposite number over on Rugged Island, but soon finds he is not cut out for a life of self-denial. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Jessica Hynes and guest captain David Walliams take on Jon Richardson and Rhod Gilbert. Sam Simmons joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of the team's favourite investigations. Kate Quilton visits Haagen-Dazs to find out why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, while Helen Lawal heads to Tanzania to see the lengths vanilla farmers go to in the production of the natural flavouring. Matt Tebbutt travels to the Netherlands to explore the myth that Edam was once used as emergency cannon balls and Jimmy Doherty learns about an innovative solution to the problem of shellfish feeding on discarded plastic in the sea

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Brighton to secretly restore a 1984 Audi UR Quattro, which has been under a tarpaulin on a drive for 10 years. Owner Barry has dreamed of working on the vehicle, but health issues have left him sapped of energy and unable to fulfil his wish

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend fix up a historic racing car, an Austin Healey Sprite, which has been kept in a garage since 1968. The challenge is to restore the car so that Sir Stirling Moss, who raced in the vehicle at Sebring in the USA in 1962, can get back behind the wheel

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Northumberland to restore a real 'barn find'; a 1934 Morgan F4 three-wheeler, which has been stored in a shed for more than 50 years. The vehicle was one of the most successful lightweight cars from the early days of motoring

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Health-conscious grandmother Tina Ainsworth hosts the first dinner party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, putting on a Chinese-themed evening for her guests - croupier Tomasz Wisniewski, PR consultant Julia Smith, copy writer Rachel Imms and DJ Gareth Harding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Croupier Tomasz Wisniewski hosts the second dinner party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire. His 'outrageous'-themed evening leaves plenty of scope for his guests' imaginations, but his balloon-pumping competition brings out the competitive streak in one contestant

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Gareth Harding hosts the third dinner party from Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, where he provides an Ibiza-themed night after he transforms his garden into a Balearic cocktail bar and club complete with lasers and disco lights. The guests seem impressed with the host's sophisticated menu, but he may have bitten off more than he can chew as he attempts to cook a tricky beef Wellington

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Animal lover Rachel Imms hosts the fourth party of the week from Mansfield. She opts for a French-themed evening, but her complicated main course proves to be a challenge, and her accordionist entertainer does not appeal to everyone in the way she had hoped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dance fanatic Julia Smith hosts the final party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, and is confident she will wow fellow competitors with her fancy house and hospitality, having roped in two waiters to give the evening a touch of class. A spot of salsa dancing proves entertaining for all the wrong reasons, and as the event draws to a close, the contestants gather to discover which dinner was rated the best

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Trecarne House in Liskeard, Cornwall, where owners Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The pair win the group's admiration by sharing their life story, but one guest stirs up intrigue by holding his cards close to his chest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners spend their second night of the competition at the Magna Carta at Windsor in Berkshire, a five-star floating bed and breakfast run by Captain Dominic Read. The guests are pleasantly surprised upon arrival, but not all are impressed by the standard of the accommodation - and a cracked teapot at the breakfast table leads to trouble for the proprietor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is Ash Cottage near Leeds Castle in Kent, where the unusual decor is an eye-opener for the guests but is not everyone's cup of tea. Trish and Tom get heated over the instant coffee before owners Rayne and Chris Deal take their fellow contestants to Chatham Dockyard to try their hands at rope-making

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is A Room with a View in Brighton, where owner Stephen Bull and housekeeper Joanna Harris hope their nine-room establishment will impress the contestants. Things get off to a good start when Rayne and Chris Deal are impressed by the cleanliness of the property, but things take a turn for the worse when breakfast gets the thumbs down

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their critics face-to-face. Hosts of Trecarne House in Cornwall Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan raise issues with Magna Carta's Dominic Read on his mark for their hosting, while he has a bone to pick with them over criticism of his five-star floating B&B. Stephen and Joanna of A Room with a View in Brighton receive complaints about their breakfast, and tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Straight-talking Janice hosts the first party in Cheltenham, but the success of her evening is under threat when conversation turns to the medical history of a guest's dog. Things then proceed to get even worse as the host serves an under-prepared pavlova

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lady-of-the-manor Vanessa hosts the second party in Cheltenham, but asks her diners to wear slippers to protect the floors of her country home. It proves to be an unhappy evening for sole male contestant Alex when he gets more dessert than he bargained for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sole male contestant Alex hosts the third party in Cheltenham and is confident of impressing his three dinner guests, but the evening turns sour when Vanessa and Janice almost come to blows

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Final host Cathy welcomes her fellow diners into her home for the last party in Cheltenham, but she faces the tough task of reuniting a feuding group before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: D-Day: The King Who Fooled Hitler
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the role played by George VI in maintaining the secrecy of the plans for the D-Day Landings, and how the royal family regained the trust of British intelligence, following concerns about Edward VIII's reputation as a Nazi sympathiser. The programme also examines how the Queen Mother preserved one of the greatest secrets of the Second World War

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a man is having his third seizure of the day. He's in a semi-conscious state and needs to get to hospital urgently, but the two paramedics in attendance need back-up

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes with the Devon and Cornwall police force, showing the critical decisions that the communications and control centre team makes each day. The first edition covers the Easter bank holidays, and incident manager Adele must decide which jobs to prioritise, with only limited resources at her disposal. The weekend begins with a violent arrest, which uses up all of Paignton's available response officers, while the only dedicated traffic officer is called to an accident in Exmouth

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary follows paramedics as they deal with people who have mental health problems. Maria Stanley is called to a multi-storey car park, where she tries to talk a man away from the edge, while Kirsten Harper and Amy Siddall race to help a father who is having suicidal thoughts. In London, crews attend the scene of a failed suicide attempt that has left a middle-aged man trapped under a train

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at London's King's College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A driver is stopped attempting to smuggle 15kg of cocaine across the border, and a truck driver's modified cab attracts attention at the World Trade Bridge

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Concrete channels hidden in a mountaintop forest, a collapsing bridge, a marooned military base and the upright rusting carcass of ship

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Writer, actor, comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton accompanies Richard Ayoade on a voyage of discovery in Lisbon, the Portuguese capital city known for its decorative tiling and maritime history. Adam and Richard tackle it at break-neck speed in an electric rickshaw, visit a tinned-fish emporium, take the celebrated iron lift - the Elevador de Santa Justa - and listen to some fado, Lisbon's version of the blues. There's potent cherry liqueur for breakfast, a tram ride up a steep hillside and a trip to a doll hospital. The duo also pay a visit to Belem, home to Lisbon's famed custard tarts

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedy actor Jack Dee embark on a clock-conscious exploration of the Italian city, enjoying two days rich in humour, history, culture and pizza. The pair start with a guided tour on vintage Vespas amid the city's chaotic traffic, attend a pizza-making class and then head to the volcanic ruins of Herculaneum. Day two sees them visit the Isle of Capri and play the lottery using la smorfia, a local guide to the meaning of dreams

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef is invited to a family feast in Corfu and learns how to make authentic Greek food in restaurant kitchens around the island. Later, Rick heads for familiar surroundings in Majorca, where he worked as a teenage cook, and finds out what British tourists like to eat

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond tests Volkswagen's Touareg off-roader, before driving a racing version of the car against a group of snowmobile riders in Sweden. James May tries to drive faster than he has ever done before in the Bugatti Veyron Super Sport, Jeremy Clarkson examines the legacy of Formula One driver Ayrton Senna, and Tom Cruise and Cameron Diaz are the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The presenters hit the road in a Jensen-Healey, a Lotus and a TVR as they chart the decline of the British sports car industry, on a journey from Norfolk to Blackpool. programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second programme this year from RAF Coningsby in Lincolnshire, and discovers the story of a length of tree that ended up inside a Lancaster bomber. Treasures brought in to be valued include a harp that survived the French Revolution, a curious wooden item with an unexpected purpose, a diamond brooch found hidden inside a barometer and a pair of Second World War propaganda posters printed on hessian sacking

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The story of how a town established by Henry Ford in the 1920s has been left to rot in the Amazonian rainforest. Plus, Mysterious monoliths scattered over a Polish forest

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo's tour takes him to Alton, Hampshire, where he samples Victorian super food, explores Whitchurch Silk Mill, which has remained untouched for more than 150 years, and drives a steam train on the challenging Watercress Line

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo has a go at playing Winchester Cathedral's Victorian organ as he continues his tour of Britain's railways. He also goes behind the scenes at a rail works in Eastleigh that began operating in the 19th century, and travels to the Isle of Wight, one of Queen Victoria's favourite holiday destinations

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Walmer castle, Kent, and is challenged to identify a valuable 18th-century glass out of a collection of reproductions. Other items brought in to be valued include a rare pottery piglet, a revolving table with secret compartments, a British PoW's diary, a set of French fashion illustrations from the 1920s, a table clock and a collection of Victorian ceramic birds

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskovitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a loving home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics

programme.title: Trains That Changed the World
programme.desc: How China has developed one of the world's fastest high speed rail networks, allowing 75 million people across the country to reach Shanghai within an hour

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An advanced German battleship that sank in a Norwegian fjord during the Second World War, the Miles Glacier Bridge in Alaska, and a mysterious concrete giant in Bulgaria

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The events of 1944, when the death toll rose substantially. By this point, the Allies were aware of Auschwitz's purpose, and faced a difficult decision over what should be done about it. Plus, the story of the occupation of Hungary, revealing how Adolf Eichmann offered to spare a million Jews in return for certain services

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How German U-boats were used to disrupt the flow of goods from America across the Atlantic Ocean in an attempt to starve Britain into submission

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo journeys from Brockenhurst to Poole. He heads to the New Forest, where he seeks venomous adders, discovers a library in Wimborne containing rare books and visits 19th-century potteries that are still trading today

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues following the route Queen Victoria took from Windsor Castle to the Isle of Wight, and reveals the oil fields hidden beneath some of England's seaside resorts. During his journey, he also explores the role the Dorset town of Weymouth played in the D-Day landings during the Second World War, and visits the site of Victorian Britain's most famous building rock in Portland

programme.title: Wonders of the Universe
programme.desc: Professor Brian Cox explores how the development of mankind and the history of the universe are intertwined, visiting dramatic locations around the world to illustrate the fundamental scientific principles that govern the laws of nature. He begins by investigating time, charting the evolution of the cosmos and explaining why the universe must one day come to an end

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Ruins from the time before the fall of the Berlin Wall, including a covert Communist base that hid Cold War submarines for Tito and the former HQ of the Soviet Army in East Germany

programme.desc: Experts analyse the content of Viking burial sites to learn more about Norse culture, beginning with the mass grave of a raiding party, which dates back to Roman times

programme.title: Big in America: British Hits in the USA
programme.desc: Compilation of British rock 'n' roll acts in performance, featuring songs that crossed over to the US charts. From the Dave Clark Five to Coldplay, the Brits have rocked America and sometimes even done better across the pond than on home soil. A Flock of Seagulls, Supertramp and Bush also feature, alongside darker British global exports like Black Sabbath and the Cure

programme.title: Meat Loaf: In and Out of Hell
programme.desc: A profile of the rock star's life and career, reflecting on the music that propelled him to fame and charting his journey from an overweight, bullied child to his larger-than-life persona and icon status. Featuring an interview and performance by the singer, as well as backstage footage from a Las Vegas concert. The film also revisits the Dallas of Meat Loaf's early years and includes insights from high school friends who reveal where the unusual moniker really came from

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: The small, picturesque seaside station at Dawlish in Devon is brought to life by an influx of people attending an air show, and the company lays on extra staff, schedules more trains and employs different queuing systems to cope with all the passengers. At Bath Spa, gate-line operator Peter Eagle tries his hand at foreign languages as he directs international tourists to and from the ancient city

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Bruce Parkin steps off a train with his family to attend his retirement party after 52 years' service, making him one of Europe's longest-serving drivers. The redevelopment of Reading station is the largest overhaul on the Great Western network since the days of Brunel, and Murray Parkin and his team carry out the last engine change at the historic Cow Lane site before they head over to their new state-of-the-art terminal

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: A major service disruption hits Paddington on Meet the Manager day, and there is a look at Brunel's last engineering masterpiece, the Royal Albert Bridge, which spans the River Tamar and connects Devon and Cornwall. A fitter has to repair a faulty peak-time train full of passengers, and Charlbury station prepares for the Wilderness festival

programme.title: Mountain Gorilla
programme.desc: Patrick Stewart narrates this documentary, following the last remaining members of the species as they fight for survival on the slopes of central Africa. Dominant silverback Cantsbee protects those close to him as they make a perilous descent to feed on bamboo. On the other side of the Rwandan volcanos, a young female gorilla looks to her father for guidance after being deserted by her mother, and a teenage silverback tries to strike out on his own in Uganda

programme.title: Mountain Gorilla
programme.desc: Ageing silverback leader Titus faces his greatest challenge when he tries to care for a vulnerable orphan, while hot-headed youngster Marembo sets about making his presence felt in the mountains of Uganda. Narrated by Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Mountain Gorilla
programme.desc: Some of the most vulnerable members of the species struggle to survive, including two orphans whose mothers were killed and a young female who is finding it difficult to deal with unfamiliar emotions. The new 'gorilla king' also has trouble keeping those in his care under control. Narrated by Patrick Stewart

The crew also faces the challenge of refueling the vessel at sea - one of the hardest tasks outside of going into battle

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The history of the concentration camp, charting its origins as a place to hold political prisoners through its development into a mechanised factory for mass murder. The first episode features the accounts of Polish inmates held there prior to the Holocaust, Jewish survivors and a former SS officer, who discusses being placed in charge of a firing squad

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: A look at the early stages of genocide at the camp, examining the role of commander Rudolf Hoess in the process. Despite later claiming he was only following orders, Hoess was instrumental in the development of Auschwitz for mass murder, arranging for Soviet prisoners to be brought in as construction workers and scouring Europe for more victims to kill. Featuring contributions from survivors

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Examining the complex system the Nazis set up to implement the extermination of the Jewish race throughout Europe from 1942, with Auschwitz as the hub. The programme reveals that at other camps, including Treblinka, Belzec and Sobibor, rival commanders participated in the genocide with enthusiasm and shared ideas for the best method of mass murder

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: A look at how corruption became rife within the SS, with the money stolen from Jews finding its way into the pockets of the camp guards rather than funding the war effort. Many of the SS also enjoyed illicit sexual relationships with female prisoners. Meanwhile, Dr Mengele embarked on a gruesome series of experiments, using children as guinea pigs in his research into genetic inheritance

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: The events of 1944, when the death toll rose substantially. By this point, the Allies were aware of Auschwitz's purpose, and faced a difficult decision over what should be done about it. Plus, the story of the occupation of Hungary, revealing how Adolf Eichmann offered to spare a million Jews in return for certain services

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: The property expert visits Hampton Court Palace just outside London, most famous as King Henry VIII's home. After 500 years of royal rebuilding, is is now a fusion of styles. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Maureen, who's 66, is rushed to St George's struggling to breathe through her tracheostomy. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night from in and around Newcastle, and the turn of Essex boy Mark to impress his new Geordie chums with a menu of deep fried brie, slow-cooked lamb and a passion fruit pavlova. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The De Ropers' hopes of a peaceful life in Yeovil, Somerset, were rudely shattered by their neighbour Peter Stoodley's 120 noisy chickens, and they spent their first two years in their new home battling to persuade the authorities to ban him from keeping animals. In a quiet Anglesey village, 67-year-old Pamela Booth's discovered that her neighbour had been fraudulently using her bank card to steal more than £1,000 over 10 months, while a 24-year-old wannabe rapper in Dagenham, east London, generated more than 80 complaints after repeatedly keeping residents awake by playing loud music into the early hours in his flat

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Close friends Janet Perrie and Fiona Hope moved to the South Ayrshire village of Dipple in search of an idyllic new life for themselves and their 22 dogs. Unfortunately for them, other residents were enraged by the noise, smell and mess and wasted no time in contacting the authorities. In a cul-de-sac in Leicestershire, the Pollard, Walne and Elliott families have been harassed by 68-year-old Leslie Collins for more than a decade after they complained about the noise from an illegal wood-waste business he was running from his home. He then began to target them with increasingly intimidating behaviour - including mooning, two-finger salutes, shouting abuse, cutting holes in hedges and spying on them with binoculars

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. programme.title: Two and a Half Men
