programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: The Harpers are shocked to be considered old when Charlie's young girlfriend takes him and Alan to a club. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn returns from the funeral of a friend, upset by the lack of mourners at the service, causing Alan and Charlie to worry about their mother's final send-off. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Holland Taylor

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul Bohill and Phil Short must deal with a negligent tenant who fled upon their arrival, forcing the agents to set a trap in order to evict him. Brian O'Shaughnessy and Kevin Stokes chase a debt of £5,000 in Kent, before heading to Surrey to recover £11,000 owed by the owner a bespoke furniture business. Plus, Paul and Steve Pinner's patience is tested to the limit when they are sent to carry out an eviction in London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart McCracken and Elmore Victor head to Liverpool for what they expect to be a routine repossession, but instead face the most challenging eviction of their careers. Behind the front door, they find a critically ill two-year-old child with major heart problems, who is on constant life support and unable to breathe without a ventilator. Meanwhile, Brian O'Shaughnessy and Del Anglin chase £2,000 worth of debt owed by a business based in Kent, and recover £4,000 from a recycling business in Buckinghamshire. Plus, Stewart and Elmore encounter another family in crisis in Birmingham, where a retired couple who acted as guarantor for their daughter's tenancy are liable to pay over £3,000 after she defaulted

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Delroy and Kevin face a web of deceit in an Italian delicatessen in south London as they chase a huge debt amounting to £29,000. Meanwhile, Steve and Paul must evict a tenant in north London who has not paid her rent for over 18 months, before heading to Cambridgeshire to make one of their most emotional evictions to date. Plus, Brian and Delroy track down a pensioner in Surrey who owes £15,000 for a business he bought four years ago

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: An east London landlord who trusted his property to a letting agency discovers the house is being advertised on a Romanian website - and strangers have moved in. A South Yorkshire single mum is owed £10,000 in back rent when her tenant disappears, and has to prove he has abandoned the property to get it back. Plus, west London housing officers investigate a tip-off about people living in dangerous conditions behind a row of shops

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Susan and Gary bought an East End flat to let out and were approached by a letting agent who promised hassle-free guaranteed rent. But before they knew it, he had broken in and changed the locks. Now they are fighting to get the property back. Meanwhile, landlord Paul discovers that his seriously ill father's long-standing tenant owes a staggering £20,000 in rent for living in her Notting Hill home

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kent couple Rachel and Chris are pushed to the limit when their relationship with their tenant breaks down and she stops paying rent, leaving them more than £5,000 out of pocket. Now they need to get her out or they could lose the house. Elsewhere, a tenant uses scare tactics to keep his landlord off his back, and in Harrow, council housing officers investigate a residential property that has been turned into a brothel

programme.title: The Last Samurai (2003)
programme.desc: The emperor of Japan recruits an American Civil War veteran to train his troops in a bid to wipe out a rebel faction of samurai warriors. The soldier is taken captive when the imperial army is defeated, and comes to respect his enemies' traditions and code of honour, finally going over to their side. Historical adventure, starring Tom Cruise, Ken Watanabe, Timothy Spall, Billy Connolly and Shichinosuke Nakamura

programme.desc: The detectives investigate the abduction and murder of a child, following a lead to a suspected serial paedophile, who is found holding another boy captive. However, the youngster seems to be more than just an innocent victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl goes missing from her foster home, and when Logan and Briscoe investigate, the kidnapper is revealed to be an unstable woman who claims she is acting in the child's best interests. With this in mind, the pair examine whether the youngster's carers are guilty of abusive behaviour. Starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A tennis star is attacked in her locker room before a big tournament, and her wrist is broken during the incident. The sportswoman cannot give a description of her assailant, but the circumstances of the fray lead the detectives to suspect one of her competitors. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A dispute over a pair of trousers missing from a dry cleaner's ends in murder - and the ensuing investigation leads Lupo and Green to a businessman working for a shady multinational chain of department stores. Drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man who served as a juror in the trial of a mobster is shot dead at a baseball game, leading to a battle of wills between McCoy and his long-time friend - the suspect's attorney. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The body of a drug addict is discovered in the yard of a daycare centre, and evidence reveals she was the heiress to the fortune. However, suspicions are raised when the family's lawyer gets power of attorney over the trust fund. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US marine's parachute fails to open during a training exercise and he plunges to his death, leaving the team to determine whether he was murdered. The man had a reputation for good fortune and invariably walked away from accidents unscathed - but his luck at the poker table may have cost him dearly. Mark Harmon and David McCallum star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A naval commander's body is washed ashore along with the bullet-riddled corpses of two drug traffickers, suggesting he was involved in illicit activities. Gibbs refuses to believe the worst and tries to prove the man's innocence by finding whoever else was involved in the shoot-out. Guest starring Emilie de Ravin (Lost)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant's mummified body is found 10 years after his disappearance, prompting renewed interest in the case. Declared a deserter, he was given a dishonourable discharge - chiefly because $1million went missing from his ship's safe on the day he vanished. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs, Tony and Kate board an aircraft carrier to investigate the deaths of two crewmen who appear to have overdosed, even though the pair had no history of drug use. At first the inquiry seems doomed to failure - until training tapes offer an unlikely lead. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: A series of apparently supernatural accidents threatens to derail Becca's latest television show

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man accused of the sexual abuse of his daughter is subsequently murdered, but laying the blame at the door of the chief suspects proves difficult. Several family members are in the frame, but despite evidence of a gun outside the victim's office, they appear to be innocent

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates the ritualistic murder of a boy, a woman and an elderly man, and finds they all figured in sexual abuse cases investigated by Benson. As more dead bodies turn up, it becomes clear the detective is the killer's next target - but the others find themselves unable to prove anything against the most likely suspect

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson investigate the death of a world-famous singer's son, and soon begin to suspect that parental neglect may have been a factor in the case - leading them to fear for the victim's younger sister. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An exceptional teacher who helped inner-city kids get into college is murdered, but Stabler and Benson's investigation reveals her sinister double life as a sex addict - which has made her plenty of enemies. Meanwhile, Munch and Tutuola discover her sordid relationship with a married doctor. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the fate of a woman who was lured into the vice trade by the promise of a career as a model. However, the discovery of a severed leg - which proves to have belonged to a girl reported missing in Nevada - prompts Horatio to call for help from Vegas-based colleague Dr Raymond Langston. The first edition of a three-part CSI crossover, guest starring Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A mother-of-two is killed when her car is involved in an accident with a stolen vehicle. A man who initially appears to be a heroic passer-by turns out to be the other driver, and the team is left to investigate whether a crime has been committed or if it was just an unfortunate crash. Starring David Caruso

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's cousin Emma, a vivacious dance hall performer, turns detective after she is suspected of murdering her lover by serving him poisoned herring

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica helps Sheriff Amos Tupper investigate the murder of his deputy's wife and discovers a few surprising facts about the bereaved husband along the way. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury and Tom Bosley

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica impersonates an old friend to track down a hit-and-run driver and uncovers a sordid tale of blackmail, theft and murder. Drama starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Native American arrives in Jessica's beloved Cabot Cove, claiming the whole town and its surrounding area belongs to him, and clutching a land grant to prove it. When a local industrialist is found murdered soon after, all signs point to the newcomer being the culprit. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury and Tom Bosley

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While staying in an opulent hotel, courtesy of Grady's fraternity brother Gary, Jessica becomes embroiled in a fight to clear Grady of a woman's murder, which is tied to Gary's past

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to witness the reappearance of a mysterious comet, but instead finds herself conducting another murder investigation. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica persuades Seth to visit his estranged brother, who promptly turns up dead. The sleuth must uncover whether he was killed by a curse supposedly placed on a stolen Indian pendant, which a diplomat is determined to see returned to its own country. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A famous, but ailing, playwright tempts fate by proposing to Jessica - and almost immediately finds himself charged with murdering his business manager. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A priest and government agents using a safe house get Jessica involved in a complicated case, in which she hears the confession of a dying assassin who is connected to a recent murder. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The kidnapping of a baby at a grocery store leads the detectives to a shady racket that involves snatching infants and arranging to sell them for adoption. Unexpectedly, the investigation produces new leads on an old case involving a murdered mother and her missing child - which had been supervised by Cragen and his partner. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An HIV-positive man with a record of assaulting under-age girls is suspected of a series of rapes and murders - but Stabler's determination to charge him results in tragedy. Undeterred, the team pursues its new suspect, a rap promoter, though his cunning leaves little hope of a conviction. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former police officer turned community activist becomes the prime suspect for the detectives as they investigate the murders of two known sex offenders. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler try to solve the rape of a veteran police officer, but their efforts are thwarted by officers from the Department of Internal Affairs who seem determined to suppress evidence and bury the case. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A company is suspected of deliberately engineering the deaths of its employees to cash in on their insurance policies - including murdering a luckless caretaker by plunging him into a tank of deadly jellyfish. As the CSIs investigate, Jesse is reunited with a mysterious woman from his past. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cibrian and David Caruso

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A car chase results in the discovery of a census taker's body in the boot of a vehicle, but the driver claims not to know how he got there. Ryan and Natalia visit the neighbourhood where the victim was last seen - and find themselves facing danger in a booby-trapped drugs laboratory. Crime drama, starring Jonathan Togo

programme.title: Columbo: Murder - A Self Portrait (1989)
programme.desc: A possessive painter who fears his ex-wife will expose his dark secrets resorts to killing her, but makes it appear she drowned. However, Columbo is unconvinced and draws on his broad palette of experience to reveal the truth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Patrick Bauchau and Fionnula Flanagan

programme.title: Columbo: Swan Song (1974)
programme.desc: A country singer arranges for his wife and his underage lover to both die in a phoney plane crash after his spouse diverts all his money to her religious causes in revenge for his affair. He is confident he remains above suspicion, but Columbo realises something does not add up and sets out to wrest a confession from the musician. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Johnny Cash and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: Troubled Waters (1975)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth sets out on a pleasure cruise to Acapulco. However, one of the passengers is planning to kill his lover to stop her blackmailing him, and has arranged a cast-iron alibi. But when the crime is discovered, the captain looks to Columbo to solve the mystery. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Vaughn, Dean Stockwell, Patrick Macnee and Poupee Bocar

programme.title: Columbo: Try and Catch Me (1977)
programme.desc: A grieving crime writer blames her niece's husband for her death and concocts a plan to take revenge, luring him to her walk-in vault, before locking him in and leaving him to die. She then puts her knowledge of the criminal mind to good use by covering her tracks, and although Columbo strongly suspects foul play, he finds clues are thin on the ground. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Ruth Gordon

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Dangerous Match (1973)
programme.desc: An American chess champion fears he is about to be beaten by a superior player from Russia, and decides the only sure-fire way he can avoid defeat is by murdering his opponent. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Laurence Harvey and Jack Kruschen

programme.title: Columbo: It's All in the Game (1993)
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite and her daughter discover they have been seeing the same man, and have him killed. When Columbo investigates the case, the mother is determined to make sure all his attention is on her and not her daughter, and an unlikely romance develops between sleuth and suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Faye Dunaway

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a pregnant woman with a drug habit. Goren and Eames focus their search on the victim's boyfriend and are highly suspicious of his story, but further evidence leads them to realise other members of his wealthy family may have been involved. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A urologist is murdered, and his wife claims she was raped and robbed by the killer. Stabler and Benson suspect the doctor's mistress of being involved - until she too is sexually assaulted, and details of another relationship emerge, shedding light on the culprit's identity. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and another officer team up to track down a serial killer, focusing their investigation on a recently released sex offender - but fresh evidence leads them to believe he may have been wrongly convicted. Concerned that a miscarriage of justice could have occurred, they look over old case files and turn their attention to the suspect's neighbour, a man with employment links in the vicinity of seven murders around the country. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and David Keith

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team races against time to find a girl's kidnapper, who appears to be a serial killer with a penchant for murdering his victims after three days. A promising lead is found by retracing an old case - but on arrival at the suspect's house, another body is discovered in the closet. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen and Stabler pull out all the stops as they search for the runaway daughter of an out-of-state police officer, enlisting an internet journalist's help to track the missing girl. Meanwhile, Internal Affairs begin an interrogation of the team members, to make sure they are doing things strictly by the book. Police drama, starring Christopher Meloni

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A homeless man arrested for stabbing an heiress admits breaking into the victim's house, but claims he was not involved in the crime. programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Pop singer Phoebe Nichols reportedly burns to death on stage during a surprise concert in Miami, but analysis of the remains reveals that an impersonator died in her place. Manager Julian Diehl admits the real star mysteriously disappeared, forcing him to employ the services of a double - leaving Horatio trying to solve both a murder and a missing persons case. Crime drama, starring David Caruso

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: War on Britain's Roads
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into the daily conflict between the 34 million motorists and 12 million cyclists as they compete for the same crowded space on the UK's roads. Cycle helmet cameras provide a close-up view of the unfolding tension and conflict as everyday incidents get out of hand, collisions take place and police on bikes chase down errant road-users. In addition to the footage, a mother who lost her cyclist daughter talks about what she did to change safety on the roads and a cab driver reveals how his own loss altered his opinion of bike-riders for ever

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood reveals how the owners of a jewellery shop had some tricks up their sleeves that helped them confuse a group of armed robbers. Plus, footage of a car driver who was so high on drugs that he could hardly stand up

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Brit Cops

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: The team from the Proactive Elite Unit investigates Russian scam artists, a dangerous road user, tank joyriders and a man riding a mini-motorbike

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: On-board video cameras in police cars capture footage of officers in Reading engaging in a high-speed pursuit of a stolen vehicle and others in Aylesbury staking out a suspected drug deal

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Dog handler Steve and his German shepherd are called on to assist officers in Exeter, where police have sprayed a youth with CS gas. programme.title: Obsessed with My Body
programme.desc: With British boys now apparently spending 30 per cent more time in the bathroom than teenage girls and taking twice as many selfies, this documentary follows some of those in search of the perfect body. programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of a London gangster and his family. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Burning Men (2018)
programme.desc: Two struggling musicians plan to sell their precious collection of vinyl records to fund a road trip to Memphis. They resort to stealing an extremely rare black metal album, and begin to suspect a curse has been placed on the record as a run of disastrous fortune befalls them. Drama, starring Edward Hayter and Aki Omoshaybi

programme.title: Last Passenger (2013)
programme.desc: A widowed doctor travelling by train with his son realises that the mysterious driver has cut the brakes and they are speeding toward a fatal collision. With the aid of four of his fellow passengers, they try to find a way to avert the disaster. Thriller, starring Dougray Scott, Kara Tointon and Lindsay Duncan

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: The Moodys
programme.desc: The comedy series concludes with a wedding, but who's getting married? As the day descends into chaos, it seems increasingly likely that nobody will make it down the aisle. Starring Ian Meadows, Patrick Brammall, Jane Harber, Phil Lloyd and Rachel Gordon

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny follows a woman who plans to live with her family in the property she wants to develop, and keep a close eye on her £400,000 dream. But as the project progresses, she loses control of both the development and the budget, putting the entire undertaking at risk of failure

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: An artificial intelligence tries to erase the band from the internet, while Maxine asks X to spy on the girls, as she is worried one of them is thinking about quitting

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: X is kidnapped by a mysterious ninja. The girls seek the aid of their bodyguard's old karate teacher to learn the skills they will need to rescue him

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings visit a village that is supposedly being terrorised by a monster - and Vic meets a like-minded youngster who is determined to prove that the creature is not real

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Vic comes to the rescue of a princess, who is heading to a storytelling festival

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Elle the elephant hurts her trunk and Zigby decides to set up a hospital on the island

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew encounters a sea monster while fishing for clams

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Tjure's laziness causes conflict to erupt between the men and women of the village, and only Vic can make sure everything gets back to normal

programme.desc: A story read by Zara makes Laurence keen to know if unicorns exist

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara finds some interesting items as she hunts for dinosaur relics

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps Justin and Suzanne Croft find a holiday home in Le Marche in Italy. A restored village house priced at £81,000 and a deconsecrated church running to a modest £75,000 are among the properties under consideration

programme.title: The Boy Who Turned Yellow (1972)
programme.desc: A boy looking for his lost pet mouse has a strange experience on the London Underground that gives him special powers. Family adventure, starring Mark Dightam and Robert Eddison

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk (1944)
programme.desc: Two tough Australian soldiers fight alongside an intellectual Englishman in the North African campaign. They become involved in a critical siege, and their fearless efforts manage to hold up the German advance for months. Second World War drama, starring Grant Taylor, Peter Finch and Chips Rafferty

programme.title: The Gay Dog (1954)
programme.desc: The owner of a racing greyhound loses faith in his dog's ability to win when he encounters a faster animal. However, his friends are determined to prove him wrong. Comedy, starring Wilfred Pickles, Petula Clark and Megs Jenkins

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Yorkshire couple Tony Haywood and Linda Lancaster search for a retirement home in Bulgaria, where property prices are guaranteed not to break the bank. They look at a village house on the market for £6,500 and a five-bedroom seaside villa with its own pool and sauna for only £40,500

programme.title: Opening Up the Soane
programme.desc: Documentary about the extensive refurbishment of Sir John Soane's Museum to restore the building to its original glory

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey spreads her wings for the first time since her husband was put behind bars, and invites a handsome footballer round for dinner. Meanwhile, Sharon discovers the joys of literature. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Allow Me to Die
programme.desc: Documentary about two people who wish to control their own mortality, exploring the legal acceptance of assisted dying in Belgium

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Producer Mark Ronson compares notes with Ronnie about their varied approaches to the recording process, and the pair also discuss artists including Amy Winehouse and Stevie Wonder

programme.title: Blue Iguana (2018)
programme.desc: Eddie and Paul, former prisoners working in a New York diner, are made an offer they cannot refuse by English lawyer Katherine Rookwood. Romantic comedy, starring Sam Rockwell, Phoebe Fox and Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The C Word
programme.desc: Sheridan Smith stars in this drama based on the blog and book by Lisa Lynch, an account of her life after being diagnosed with breast cancer. Twenty-eight-year-old Lisa's life is going exactly the way she wanted - she has recently married the man of her dreams and her career is on the up. Then out of the blue, she receives a shocking a diagnosis from the doctor that threatens to stop her in her tracks. Right from the start, however, Lisa is determined not to let cancer change her, and begins to write about her experience - unaware of the effect it will have on her life and that of others. Paul Nicholls, Haydn Gwynne and Michael Maloney co-star

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath

Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Computer graphics, reconstructions and interviews help to profile the covert operation to seek and destroy Hitler's V-2 rockets. The Vergeltungswaffe 2 was the world's first ballistic missile - and, with a range of 186 miles, could be fired from the continent to strike London

programme.title: Great SAS Missions
programme.desc: Major Ken Hames examines events surrounding the 1980 Iranian Embassy siege in London, during which six Arab terrorists held more than 20 hostages at gunpoint until SAS forces stormed the building, freeing the captives and killing five of their captors

programme.title: Pointless
